import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    let s = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end
    let x = match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      1
    end
    product = product * x
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("product=#{product}")
end
